name: Kyuri No Sunome (Japanese Cucumber Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel cucumbers lengthwise, leaving thin green stripes.
2. Slice very thinly into a large glass or stainless steel bowl. Add salt and mix with hand until cucumber slices are quite limp. Set aside for 45 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, mix lemon juice, sugar, MSG (if using), and white wine vinegar in a separate container.
4. Transfer the cucumber slices to a strainer over the mixing container.
5. Squeeze as much liquid as possible out of the cucumbers.
6. Discard the salt water.
7. Add the squeezed cucumbers back into the lemon juice mixture.
8. Stir in the toasted sesame seeds.
